name: message-choose
description: Static information filtering site with RSS/API normalization, filtering, dedupe, and scoring.

scripts.build:data: node scripts/normalize-items.js && node scripts/filter-items.js && node scripts/dedupe-items.js && node scripts/score-items.js && node scripts/enrich-articles.js && node scripts/generate-latest-data.js
scripts.update:daily: npm run fetch:rss && npm run build:data && npm run audit:sources && npm run archive:daily
scripts.update:summary: npm run summarize:daily && npm run archive:daily
